title: rubus × inaspectus
intro: Rubus × inaspectus is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between a black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and a red raspberry (Rubus idaeus), commonly known as a raspberry-black raspberry hybrid. The medicinal properties of Rubus × inaspectus include its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which are powerful antioxidants that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × inaspectus include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, certain cancers, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to support immune function and eye health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × inaspectus can be made into teas, jams, and supplements, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
